{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032410522413100B005AAC63746788\"}"},"total":3039},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6993704325495833380","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"啊啊啊啊，这也太好看了吧，我好喜欢⊙▽⊙，其实我觉得这种类型的文都挺好看的，这真的很好看，现在就特别期待男主知道自己喜欢女主，然后死皮赖脸的追着女主，对女主说不要离婚，但是在这前提男主要先知道女主才是那个人啊，这是我第一次最早评价的小说了，我真的好喜欢⊙▽⊙，所以作者大大，继续加油^ω^，再晚几天，我就上学了，不能看了😭😭，但没关系(´,,•㉨•,,`)，养一养文，等放假了还能看（进行自我安慰）","text_exts":[{"e":35,"s":32,"text":"都挺好","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E9%83%BD%E6%8C%BA%E5%A5%BD\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177432074463746788%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226993704325495833380%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226982819387019365407%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%83%BD%E6%8C%BA%E5%A5%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1628348683,"group_id":"6982819387019365407","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢双洁甜宠文，喜欢迪丽热巴，张杰，谢娜（喜欢杰娜的爱情）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+t3ldLbQbm11nN40qznQh5CXiktw4NwPuZdk+U87fSO","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1790db29584d44afba5dcfe9e9232bc5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776881061\u0026x-signature=RHn2OT6A0cr0ROU5ip1fiPjODOg%3D","user_id":"2357823729060398","user_name":"RADLRB"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2357823729060398","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1749273981,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":17,"name":"击穿次元","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47c082300352c1a9e6e7669d207df6fb","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/57235e9992067573933a8f743e5f9044"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6982819387019365407","book_info":{"abstract":"许安然没亲爹没干爹360线女演员，恶毒女配专业户。一朝穿书成霸总小说里天天作妖的—恶毒女配。专业对口了嘿！从此恶毒女配不作妖了，专心搞起了事业，被大佬爸爸哥哥们宠上天。穿书前的许安然励志拆散男女主，穿书后的许安然，祝你们百年好合不要打扰我搞事业谢谢。只是剧情的走向。好像有些不对………
